insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure future compatibility.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and block_progress capability. They should explore alternative approaches to achieve the desired functionality, such as using other hooks or capabilities provided by the Checkout UI extensions API. This change affects the development of new extensions and the maintenance of existing ones, ensuring they remain compatible with future versions of the API.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to remove the deprecated hook and capability, potentially affecting their sales and customer experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it ensures that developers are using the most up-to-date and supported APIs, which helps maintain the security, stability, and performance of Shopify's ecosystem.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, which may break existing implementations.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows for more control over breaking changes to Action extensions, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs, eliminating the need for manual updates.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, featuring updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload, and long URL wrapping.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types will be removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more precise region targeting.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS Extensions, App Pricing, and APIs

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. This allows for more flexibility in POS event observation and data synchronization.

themes.title: App Pricing and Development
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, Shopify Flow has been improved with fewer breaking changes and automatic updates to Action runtime URLs.

themes.title: API Updates and Deprecations
themes.detail: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types, and the Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision. The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum also returns a new value: FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and update apps to comply with updated App Store Requirements
Migrate to Admin GraphQL API 2026-07 to support MarketRegionSubdivision
